metodos.codigoOriginal:
LParameters lcAcesso

lcQryEmp  = 'Select Cemps, Razas From SigCdEmp'
lcQryEmpU = 'Select * From SigCdAcE'
lcQryUsua = 'Select * From SigCdUsu'

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector','acesso')
	
	With .poDatamgr
		* Cursor Principal Para Montagem da Lista (Tabela Grande)
		.AddCursor('SigCdEmp', 'Cemps', 'crSigCdEmp', '', ThisForm.Pagina.Lista.Grade, lcQryEmp)
		.pfSqlTabela(1).pColuna('Cemps', '', '', 'Empresa',   070, .t.)

Private pEmp

pEmp = Padr(Thisform.Pagina.Dados.Get_Empresa.Value, 3)

If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SQLExecute([Delete From SigCdAcE Where Emps = ?pEmp], '') < 1)
	=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (3)')
	Return 0
EndIf
If Not ThisForm.poDataMgr.Update('crSigCdAcE')
	=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (4)')
	Return 0
EndIf

	=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo... [TRUNCADO]

Private pEmp

pEmp = Padr(Thisform.Pagina.Dados.Get_Empresa.Value, 3)

	Return 0
EndIf
If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.Commit() < 1)
	=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (5)')
	Return 0
EndIf

NoDefault
* Fim **************************************************************************************

EndIf

	=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcEmp

lcEmp = Alltrim(ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.Get_Empresa.Value)

Select crSigCdEmp
Set Near On
Locate For Cemps = lcEmp
Set Near Off
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Lparameters Opcao

If (Type('Opcao') = 'N')
	This.Value = Opcao
EndIf

Select crSigCdAcE

ThisForm.LockScreen = .t.

lcCEmps = crSigCdEmp.CEmps
lcRazas = crSigCdEmp.Razas

If Not DoDefault(Opcao)
	ThisForm.LockScreen = .f.
	ThisForm.mAtivapagina1
	Return 0
EndIf

With ThisForm.Pagina.Dados
	.Usuario.Clear
	.UsuEmp.Clear

	If (ThisForm.pcEscolha <> 'PROCURAR')
		If InList(ThisForm.pcEscolha, 'INSERIR', 'ALTERAR')
			lcSQLCmd = [Select Distinct Usuarios ] + ;
						 [From SigCdUsu ] + ;
						[Whe... [TRUNCADO]

If InList(Thisform.pcEscolha, 'INSERIR', 'ALTERAR')
	Zap In crSigCdAcE
	
	m.Emps  = crSigCdEmp.Cemps
	m.DEmps = crSigCdEmp.Razas
	For C = 1 To ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.UsuEmp.ListCount
		m.Usuarios = ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.UsuEmp.List(C)
		m.pkChaves = fUniqueIds()
		Insert Into crSigCdAcE From Memvar
	Next
EndIf

Select crLogData
Scan
	=fGravarLog(cTipos, 'CADEMP', ThisForm.pcEscolha, cOcors, Usuar)
EndScan

=DoDefault()

ThisForm.mAtivaPagina1
* Fim ************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

If Inlist(ThisForm.pcEscolha, 'INSERIR', 'ALTERAR')
	With ThisForm.Pagina.Dados
		If .Usuario.Selected(.Usuario.ListIndex)
			_Valor = .Usuario.List(.Usuario.ListIndex)
			lcIdChaves = 'USUARIO'+_Valor
			Select crLogData
			Seek lcIdChaves
			If ! Found()
				Insert Into crLogData (cIdChaves, cOcors, cTipos) ;
					Values(lcIdChaves, 'Empresa : ' + This.Parent.Get_Empresa.Value + ' Usuario : ' + _Valor, 'I')

				EndIf

			.Usuario.RemoveItem(.Usu... [TRUNCADO]

ThisForm.LockScreen = .t.

With ThisForm.Pagina.Dados
	For I = 1 To .Usuario.ListCount
		.UsuEmp.AddItem(.Usuario.List(I))

ThisForm.LockScreen = .t.

With ThisForm.Pagina.Dados
	For I = 1 to .UsuEmp.ListCount
		.Usuario.AddItem(.UsuEmp.List(I))
		_Valor =  .UsuEmp.List(I)
		lcIdChaves = 'USUARIO'+_Valor
		Select crLogData
		Seek lcIdChaves
		If ! Found()
			Insert Into crLogData (cIdChaves, cOcors, cTipos) ;
				Values(lcIdChaves, 'Empresa : ' + This.Parent.Get_Empresa.Value + ' Usuario : ' + _Valor, 'E')
		Else
			If cTipos = 'I'
				Delete 
			EndIf
		Endif
	EndFor
	.UsuEmp.Clear
EndWith
